recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: Dog
recommendations.overview: An army ranger and his dog embark on a road trip along the Pacific Coast Highway to attend a friend's funeral.

recommendations.title: Compagni di scuola
recommendations.overview: A group of former high school classmates meets for a reunion 15 years after graduation, only to discover that any innocence or friendship is long lost.

recommendations.title: 3 Idiotas
recommendations.overview: A group of friends embark on an adventure to find a classmate from university who disappeared without a trace on graduation day.

recommendations.title: The Best of Me
recommendations.overview: A pair of former high school sweethearts reunite after many years when they return to visit their small hometown.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: 18 Year Old Virgin
recommendations.overview: In a series of sexual mishaps, a high school senior tries to lose her virginity on the last night before graduation.

recommendations.title: Love and Monsters
recommendations.overview: Seven years since the Monsterpocalypse began, Joel Dawson has been living underground in order to survive. But after reconnecting over radio with his high school girlfriend Aimee, Joel decides to venture out to reunite with her, despite all the dange

recommendations.title: Booksmart
recommendations.overview: Two academic teenage superstars realize, on the eve of their high school graduation, that they should have worked less and played more. Determined to never fall short of their peers, the girls set out on a mission to cram four years of fun into one n

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.
